_comment: An Azure Policy that restricts resource deployment to approved Azure regions.
Data sovereignty. Dutch organizations (especially government-adjacent like
Contoso NL) often have requirements about where data is stored. The GDPR
requires that personal data stays within the EU. This policy ensures that
nobody accidentally deploys resources to US East or Southeast Asia.
Both are within the EU, satisfying GDPR requirements.
NOTE: 'global' is also allowed because some resources (action groups, policy
definitions, role assignments) are global and have no region.

properties.displayName: Restrict resource locations to West Europe and North Europe
properties.description: Only allows resource creation in West Europe (Amsterdam) and North Europe (Dublin). Ensures data sovereignty compliance for Dutch clients.
